hook.on_ip_not_found.description: The action to take when the IP address is not found.

rtp.lowLatency.description: Whether to enable low latency for RTP.

rtmp.sslport.description: The SSL port used for RTMP.

http.sendBufSize.description: The size of the send buffer for HTTP requests.

hls.broadcastRecordTs.description: Whether to broadcast recorded TS files.

general.mergeWriteMS.description: The time in milliseconds for merging writes.

http.forbidCacheSuffix.description: The suffixes to forbid caching for HTTP requests.

hook.retry.description: The number of times to retry hooks.

rtsp.sslport.description: The SSL port used for RTSP.

hook.alive_interval.description: The interval time for sending keepalive messages for hooks in seconds.

rtmp.handshakeSecond.description: The time in seconds for the RTMP handshake.

hook.stream_changed_schemas.description: The schemas to use for stream changes in hooks.

rtc.rembBitRate.description: The bit rate for REMB in RTC.

hook.on_publish.description: The action to take when publishing a stream.

rtp_proxy.port.description: The port used for the RTP proxy.

http.sslport.description: The SSL port used for HTTP.

rtp.audioMtuSize.description: The MTU size for audio packets in RTP.

general.check_nvidia_dev.description: Whether to check for NVIDIA devices.

record.fastStart.description: Whether to enable fast start for recording.

hook.on_stream_not_found.description: The action to take when a stream is not found in hooks.

rtp_proxy.port_range.description: The port range used for the RTP proxy.

srt.timeoutSec.description: The timeout value for SRT in seconds.

rtsp.handshakeSecond.description: The time in seconds for the RTSP handshake.

hls.segDur.description: The duration for each HLS segment in seconds.

protocol.mp4_as_player.description: Whether to use MP4 as a player for the protocol.

api.secret.description: The secret key for the API.

hls.segRetain.description: The number of HLS segments to retain.

protocol.rtsp_demand.description: Whether to enable demand for RTSP.

srt.pktBufSize.description: The packet buffer size for SRT.

rtp_proxy.gop_cache.description: Whether to enable GOP caching for the RTP proxy.

http.allow_cross_domains.description: Whether to allow cross-domain requests for HTTP.

protocol.modify_stamp.description: Whether to modify the timestamp for the protocol.

rtp.videoMtuSize.description: The MTU size for video packets in RTP.

protocol.enable_audio.description: Whether to enable audio for the protocol.

hook.on_server_keepalive.description: The action to take when the server keeps alive.

protocol.ts_demand.description: Whether to enable demand for TS.

protocol.enable_fmp4.description: Whether to enable FMP4 for the protocol.

rtsp.lowLatency.description: Whether to enable low latency for RTSP.

http.allow_ip_range.description: The IP range to allow for HTTP requests.

hook.on_rtsp_realm.description: The action to take when the RTSP realm is accessed in hooks.

hook.on_stream_changed.description: The action to take when a stream is changed in hooks.

http.forwarded_ip_header.description: The header to use for forwarded IP addresses in HTTP requests.

rtp_proxy.h265_pt.description: The H.265 payload type used by the RTP proxy.

hook.on_del_mp4.description: The action to take when an MP4 file is deleted in hooks.

protocol.enable_hls.description: Whether to enable HLS for the protocol.

protocol.enable_mp4.description: Whether to enable MP4 for the protocol.

protocol.fmp4_demand.description: Whether to enable demand for FMP4.

record.sampleMS.description: The time in milliseconds for each sample during recording.

shell.port.description: The port used for the shell.

hook.on_shell_login.description: The action to take when logging in to the shell.

general.unready_frame_cache.description: The size of the unready frame cache.

rtc.preferredCodecV.description: The preferred video codec for RTC.

rtp_proxy.h264_pt.description: The H.264 payload type used by the RTP proxy.

protocol.auto_close.description: Whether to automatically close connections for the protocol.

hook.on_server_exited.description: The action to take when the server is exited.

protocol.mp4_save_path.description: The save path for MP4 files in the protocol.

protocol.continue_push_ms.description: The time in milliseconds for continuing to push data for the protocol.

rtp_proxy.ps_pt.description: The payload type used for PS in the RTP proxy.

rtc.timeoutSec.description: The timeout value for RTC in seconds.

rtc.preferredCodecA.description: The preferred audio codec for RTC.

hls.segKeep.description: The number of HLS segments to keep.

multicast.udpTTL.description: The TTL value for UDP multicast.

rtp.h264_stap_a.description: Whether to enable STAP-A for H.264 in RTP.

hook.on_stream_none_reader.description: The action to take when there are no stream readers in hooks.

hook.on_record_ts.description: The action to take when recording TS files in hooks.

ffmpeg.bin.description: The path to the FFmpeg binary.

protocol.enable_ts.description: Whether to enable demand for TS in the protocol.

protocol.enable_hls_fmp4.description: Whether to enable HLS FMP4 in the protocol.

http.maxReqSize.description: The maximum size of requests for HTTP.

rtc.tcpPort.description: The TCP port used for RTC.

cluster.timeout_sec.description: The timeout value for the cluster in seconds.

general.mediaServerId.description: The ID of the media server.

hook.on_http_access.description: The action to take when accessing HTTP in hooks.

general.wait_track_ready_ms.description: The time in milliseconds to wait for a track to be ready.

rtsp.authBasic.description: Whether to enable basic authentication for RTSP.

hook.on_rtsp_auth.description: The action to take when authenticating RTSP in hooks.

protocol.rtmp_demand.description: Whether to enable demand for RTMP in the protocol.

protocol.add_mute_audio.description: Whether to add mute audio for the protocol.

record.fileBufSize.description: The buffer size for recording files.

rtmp.keepAliveSecond.description: The time in seconds to keep the RTMP connection alive.

hook.on_play.description: The action to take when playing a stream in hooks.

items.description: Class representing the 'data' array in the JSON structure.

originSock.description: 客户端和服务器网络信息，可能为null类型

createStamp.description: GMT unix系统时间戳，单位秒

identifier.description: The unique identifier for the session, e.g., "3-309".

local_ip.description: The local IP address. "::" is a shorthand in IPv6 for representing multiple groups of zeros.

peer_ip.description: The IP address of the peer in the session.

peer_port.description: The port number of the peer.

typeid.description: The type identifier for the session, indicating it's a WebRTC session from MediaKit.

local_port.description: 本机端口号 (这是个rtmp播放器或推流器)

vhost.description: 添加的流的虚拟主机，例如__defaultVhost__

app.description: 添加的流的应用名，例如live

retry_count.description: 拉流重试次数，默认为-1无限重试

timeout_sec.description: 拉流超时时间，单位秒，float类型

hls_demand.description: 该协议是否有人观看才生成

rtsp_demand.description: 该协议是否有人观看才生成

rtmp_demand.description: 该协议是否有人观看才生成

ts_demand.description: 该协议是否有人观看才生成

fmp4_demand.description: 该协议是否有人观看才生成

enable_audio.description: 转协议时是否开启音频

add_mute_audio.description: 转协议时，无音频是否添加静音aac音频

mp4_save_path.description: mp4录制文件保存根目录，置空使用默认

mp4_as_player.description: MP4录制是否当作观看者参与播放人数计数

hls_save_path.description: hls文件保存保存根目录，置空使用默认

modify_stamp.description: 该流是否开启时间戳覆盖(0:绝对时间戳/1:系统时间戳/2:相对时间戳)

auto_close.description: 无人观看是否自动关闭流(不触发无人观看hook)

vhost.description: 添加的流的虚拟主机，例如__defaultVhost__

app.description: 添加的流的应用名，例如live

dst_url.description: 目标转推url，带参数需要自行url转义

retry_count.description: 转推失败重试次数，默认无限重试

timeout_sec.description: 推流超时时间，单位秒，float类型

src_url.description: FFmpeg拉流地址,支持任意协议或格式(只要FFmpeg支持即可)

dst_url.description: FFmpeg rtmp推流地址，一般都是推给自己，例如rtmp://127.0.0.1/live/stream_form_ffmpeg

ffmpeg_cmd_key.description: 配置文件中FFmpeg命令参数模板key(非内容)，置空则采用默认模板:ffmpeg.cmd

period.description: 流的录像日期，格式为2020-02-01,如果不是完整的日期，那么是搜索录像文件夹列表，否则搜索对应日期下的mp4文件列表

customized_path.description: 自定义搜索路径，与startRecord方法中的customized_path一样，默认为配置文件的路径

max_seconds.description: mp4录像切片时间大小,单位秒，置0则采用配置项

speed.description: 要设置的录像倍速 eg.2.0

stamp.description: 要设置的录像播放位置

url.description: 需要截图的url，可以是本机的，也可以是远程主机的。

timeout_sec.description: 截图失败超时时间，防止FFmpeg一直等待截图。

expire_sec.description: 截图的过期时间，该时间内产生的截图都会作为缓存返回。

port.description: 接收端口，0则为随机端口。

tcp_mode.description: 0 udp 模式，1 tcp 被动模式, 2 tcp 主动模式。 (兼容enable_tcp 为0/1)。

stream_id.description: 该端口绑定的流ID，该端口只能创建这一个流(而不是根据ssrc创建多个)。

dst_port.description: tcp主动模式时服务端端口

dst_url.description: tcp主动模式时服务端地址

stream_id.description: 该端口绑定的流ID，该端口只能创建这一个流(而不是根据ssrc创建多个)。

ssrc.description: 推流的rtp的ssrc,指定不同的ssrc可以同时推流到多个服务器。

is_udp.description: 是否为udp模式,否则为tcp模式。

src_port.description: 使用的本机端口，为0或不传时默认为随机端口。

pt.description: 发送时，rtp的pt（uint8_t）,不传时默认为96。

use_ps.description: 发送时，rtp的负载类型。为1时，负载为ps；为0时，为es；不传时默认为1。

only_audio.description: 当use_ps 为0时，有效。为1时，发送音频；为0时，发送视频；不传时默认为0。

host.description: The host of this node. eg: node
